mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(monthly.monthOrderCount, 0) AS monthOrderCount, COALESCE(monthly.monthOriginalWeight, 0) AS monthOriginalWeight, COALESCE(monthly.monthFinishWeight, 0) AS monthFinishWeight, COALESCE(monthly.monthAmount, 0) AS monthAmount, COALESCE(monthly.monthLossWeight, 0) AS monthLossWeight, CASE WHEN COALESCE(monthly.monthOriginalWeight, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(monthly.monthLossWeight / monthly.monthOriginalWeight * 100, 2) END AS monthLossRatio, COALESCE(stock.inStockFinishCount, 0) AS inStockFinishCount, COALESCE(stock.inStockFinishWeight, 0) AS inStockFinishWeight, COALESCE(receivable.receivableCount, 0) AS receivableCount, COALESCE(receivable.receivableAmount, 0) AS receivableAmount FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS monthOrderCount, COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalWeight), 0) AS monthOriginalWeight, COALESCE(SUM(fin.finishWeight), 0) AS monthFinishWeight, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS monthAmount, COALESCE(SUM(orig.lossWeight), 0) AS monthLossWeight FROM biz_process_order o LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(actual_weight, total_weight, roll_weight, 0)) AS originalWeight, SUM(COALESCE(total_loss_weight, 0)) AS lossWeight FROM biz_original_roll WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY order_uuid ) orig ON orig.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(actual_weight, estimate_weight, 0)) AS finishWeight FROM biz_finish_roll WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(is_spare, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(roll_no_status, 1) != 3 GROUP BY order_uuid ) fin ON fin.order_uuid = o.uuid WHERE o.is_deleted = 0 AND o.order_status >= 4 AND o.order_date >= #{monthStart} AND o.order_date <= #{today} ) monthly CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS inStockFinishCount, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(actual_weight, estimate_weight, 0)), 0) AS inStockFinishWeight FROM biz_finish_roll WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(is_spare, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(roll_no_status, 1) != 3 AND finish_status = 2 ) stock CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS receivableCount, COALESCE(SUM(unreceived_amount), 0) AS receivableAmount FROM biz_settle_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND settle_status IN (1, 2) ) receivable

SELECT o.order_status AS status, CASE o.order_status WHEN 0 THEN '草稿' WHEN 1 THEN '待下发' WHEN 2 THEN '加工中' WHEN 3 THEN '待回录' WHEN 4 THEN '已完成' WHEN 5 THEN '已结算' ELSE '未知' END AS statusName, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalWeight), 0) AS originalWeight FROM biz_process_order o LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(actual_weight, total_weight, roll_weight, 0)) AS originalWeight FROM biz_original_roll WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY order_uuid ) orig ON orig.order_uuid = o.uuid WHERE o.is_deleted = 0 AND o.order_status IN (0, 1, 2, 3) GROUP BY o.order_status ORDER BY o.order_status

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(o.order_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalWeight), 0) AS originalWeight, COALESCE(SUM(fin.finishWeight), 0) AS finishWeight, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS amount FROM biz_process_order o LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(actual_weight, total_weight, roll_weight, 0)) AS originalWeight FROM biz_original_roll WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY order_uuid ) orig ON orig.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(actual_weight, estimate_weight, 0)) AS finishWeight FROM biz_finish_roll WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(is_spare, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(roll_no_status, 1) != 3 GROUP BY order_uuid ) fin ON fin.order_uuid = o.uuid WHERE o.is_deleted = 0 AND o.order_status >= 4 AND o.order_date >= #{monthStart} AND o.order_date <= #{today} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(o.order_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

SELECT o.customer_uuid AS id, o.customer_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalWeight), 0) AS weight, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS amount FROM biz_process_order o LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(actual_weight, total_weight, roll_weight, 0)) AS originalWeight FROM biz_original_roll WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY order_uuid ) orig ON orig.order_uuid = o.uuid WHERE o.is_deleted = 0 AND o.order_status >= 4 AND o.order_date >= #{monthStart} AND o.order_date <= #{today} GROUP BY o.customer_uuid, o.customer_name ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT 6

SELECT r.machine_uuid AS id, m.machine_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(r.actual_weight, r.total_weight, r.roll_weight, 0)), 0) AS weight, COALESCE(SUM(r.process_amount), 0) AS amount FROM biz_original_roll r JOIN sys_machine m ON r.machine_uuid = m.uuid JOIN biz_process_order o ON r.order_uuid = o.uuid AND o.is_deleted = 0 WHERE r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.machine_uuid IS NOT NULL AND o.order_status >= 4 AND o.order_date >= #{monthStart} AND o.order_date <= #{today} GROUP BY r.machine_uuid, m.machine_name ORDER BY weight DESC LIMIT 6

SELECT o.uuid, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.customer_name AS customerName, DATE_FORMAT(o.order_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS orderDate, o.priority, o.order_status AS orderStatus, o.print_status AS printStatus, COALESCE(orig.originalWeight, 0) AS originalWeight, COALESCE(fin.finishWeight, 0) AS finishWeight FROM biz_process_order o LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(actual_weight, total_weight, roll_weight, 0)) AS originalWeight FROM biz_original_roll WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY order_uuid ) orig ON orig.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(actual_weight, estimate_weight, 0)) AS finishWeight FROM biz_finish_roll WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(is_spare, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(roll_no_status, 1) != 3 GROUP BY order_uuid ) fin ON fin.order_uuid = o.uuid WHERE o.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY o.create_time DESC LIMIT 8
